name: Spanish White Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb White beans, canned, or Fresh cooked (cannellini)
1/4 cup Tarragon, minced OR 2 teaspoons dried Tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, gently combine the beans, tomatoes, olives, tarragon and green onions.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil, vinegar, garlic and salt to taste.
3. Fold the dressing into the bean mixture; taste for seasoning.
4. Let marinate in the refrigerator for several hours or overnight.
